'''鈭歫-h-w''' ('''kajahaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zero|zero]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zero|zero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kajahaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijahaw|thijahaw]] || [[word:jijahaw|jijahaw]] || [[word:shijahaw|shijahaw]] || [[word:kijahaw|kijahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujahaw|thuthujahaw]] || [[word:jujujahaw|jujujahaw]] || [[word:shushujahaw|shushujahaw]] || [[word:kukujahaw|kukujahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujahaw|thujahaw]] || [[word:jujahaw|jujahaw]] || [[word:shujahaw|shujahaw]] || [[word:kujahaw|kujahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujahaw|thujahaw]] || [[word:jujahaw|jujahaw]] || [[word:shujahaw|shujahaw]] || [[word:kujahaw|kujahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejahaw|thejahaw]] || [[word:jejahaw|jejahaw]] || [[word:shejahaw|shejahaw]] || [[word:kejahaw|kejahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojahaw|thothojahaw]] || [[word:jojojahaw|jojojahaw]] || [[word:shoshojahaw|shoshojahaw]] || [[word:kokojahaw|kokojahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojahaw|thojahaw]] || [[word:jojahaw|jojahaw]] || [[word:shojahaw|shojahaw]] || [[word:kojahaw|kojahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojahaw|thojahaw]] || [[word:jojahaw|jojahaw]] || [[word:shojahaw|shojahaw]] || [[word:kojahaw|kojahaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]] || [[word:jahaw|jahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jahaw|th忙jahaw]] || [[word:j忙jahaw|j忙jahaw]] || [[word:sh忙jahaw|sh忙jahaw]] || [[word:k忙jahaw|k忙jahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajahaw|thathajahaw]] || [[word:jajajahaw|jajajahaw]] || [[word:shashajahaw|shashajahaw]] || [[word:kakajahaw|kakajahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajahaw|thajahaw]] || [[word:jajahaw|jajahaw]] || [[word:shajahaw|shajahaw]] || [[word:kajahaw|kajahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajahaw|thajahaw]] || [[word:jajahaw|jajahaw]] || [[word:shajahaw|shajahaw]] || [[word:kajahaw|kajahaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajahaw|shajahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajahaw|goshajahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajahaw|gokishajahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajahawn眉|shajahawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajahawnkn眉|goshajahawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahawn眉|gokishajahawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajahawsh毛|shajahawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajahawnksh毛|goshajahawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajahawsh毛|gokishajahawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahawro|shajahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahawnkro|goshajahawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahawro|gokishajahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahawmu|shajahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahawnkmu|goshajahawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahawmu|gokishajahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajahawsher|shajahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajahawnksher|goshajahawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajahawsher|gokishajahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajahawng|shajahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajahawnkng|goshajahawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajahawng|gokishajahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajahawya|shajahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajahawnkya|goshajahawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajahawya|gokishajahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajahawyam|shajahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajahawnkyam|goshajahawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajahawyam|gokishajahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahawn眉sh毛|shajahawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahawnkn眉sh毛|goshajahawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahawn眉sh毛|gokishajahawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahawn眉ro|shajahawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahawnkn眉ro|goshajahawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahawn眉ro|gokishajahawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahawn眉mu|shajahawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahawnkn眉mu|goshajahawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahawn眉mu|gokishajahawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahawsh毛n眉|shajahawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahawnksh毛n眉|goshajahawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahawsh毛n眉|gokishajahawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahawsh毛ro|shajahawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahawnksh毛ro|goshajahawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahawsh毛ro|gokishajahawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahawsh毛mu|shajahawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahawnksh毛mu|goshajahawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahawsh毛mu|gokishajahawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahawron眉|shajahawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahawnkron眉|goshajahawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahawron眉|gokishajahawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahawrosh毛|shajahawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahawnkrosh毛|goshajahawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahawrosh毛|gokishajahawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajahawromu|shajahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajahawnkromu|goshajahawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajahawromu|gokishajahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajahawmun眉|shajahawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajahawnkmun眉|goshajahawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajahawmun眉|gokishajahawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajahawmush毛|shajahawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajahawnkmush毛|goshajahawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajahawmush毛|gokishajahawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajahawmuro|shajahawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajahawnkmuro|goshajahawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajahawmuro|gokishajahawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
